code: import React,{useRef}from'react';import*as LucideIcons from'lucide-react';import{useInView}from'../hooks/useParallax';import'./Tools.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Tools=_ref=>{let{data}=_ref;const ref=useRef();const isInView=useInView(ref);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"tools",className:"tools-section",ref:ref,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"section-content ".concat(isInView?'visible':''),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"section-label",children:"// TECHNICAL STACK"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"section-title",children:"TOOLS & PLATFORMS"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"tools-grid",children:data.map((tool,index)=>{const IconComponent=LucideIcons[tool.icon];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"tool-card cursor-hover",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"tool-icon",children:IconComponent&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(IconComponent,{size:22})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"tool-name",children:tool.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"tool-cat",children:tool.category})]},index);})})]})});};export default Tools;
